description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine SWSDAT_2, and is implemented by a call to SWSDAT_2. Use this API to return switched shunt ‘1’ real data. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr, rval = swsdt1(ibus, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the switched shunt quantity desired. (input).

string.description: Percentage of total Mvar required to regulate controlled bus voltage.
Present admittance switched on in Mvar at unity voltage.
Same as ‘BINIT’ units determined by power output option.
